description: Create a NextGen Connect channel named 'ADT_to_FHIR_Patient' that transforms HL7v2 ADT^A01 messages into FHIR R4 Patient JSON resources. Configure the source as a TCP Listener on port 6661 with MLLP framing and the destination as a File Writer saving to /tmp/fhir_output/ with unique filenames (e.g., 'patient_${message.messageId}.json'). Use a JavaScript transformer to map PID.3 to identifier, PID.5 to name (Family, Given), PID.7 to birthDate (YYYY-MM-DD), PID.8 to gender ('M' to 'male', 'F' to 'female'), PID.11 to address (City, State, Zip), and PID.13 to telecom (System='phone'), while setting the resourceType to 'Patient'. Process the test message located at /home/ga/test_adt.hl7 through the channel to generate the FHIR R4 JSON output in /tmp/fhir_output/.
